page_title: KAWORU INFINITY∞ Kaworu Nagisa Photo Collection 2
text:
is an artbook published by Kadokawa on 14 February 2026.

Overview

This book brings together all the various appearances of Kaworu Nagisa since 2015. Kaworu from corporate collaborations, apparel, games, and even Kaworu from Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. A new Kaworu has been woven by the creators specifically for this book.

The cover is drawn by popular animator Mai Yoneyama. It had with an extra-large B2 poster of the same illustration.

Table of Contents

Chapter 01: Model KAWORU p.002
Chapter 02: KAWORU in the film p.063
Chapter 03: Products KAWORU p.085
Chapter 04: In tribute to KAWORU p.103
